summary: Introducing Touch Robot, for writing interactive screenshot tests in Compose UI. We've quietly been using it at Block for ~2y to catch animation and gesture bugs. https:// saket.me/touch-robot/
content:
Introducing Touch Robot, for writing interactive screenshot tests in Compose UI. We've quietly been using it at Block for ~2y to catch animation and gesture bugs.
